title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXLVII. Games.
content:
[A game on the fingers.]

        Heetum peetum penny pie,
        Populorum gingum gie;
        East, West, North, South,
        Kirby, Kendal, Cock him out!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCXLVII. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
